item.title: Elastic Architecture Comparison
item.description: Elastic Architecture Comparison Overview Comparison of three elastic LLM architectures from Google (Gemma 3n-E2B, Gemma 4-E2B/E4B) and NVIDIA (Nemotron-Labs-3-Elastic 30B), focusing on their “many-in-one” model families and efficient parameter management techniques.

item.title: Distributed Inference for Diffusion Transformers
item.description: Distributed Inference for Diffusion Transformers Research Area: Parallelism and distributed computing techniques for accelerating Diffusion Transformer (DiT) inference across multiple GPUs.

item.title: infisical+confluence-cli integration
item.description: infisical+confluence-cli integration Security analysis of confluence-cli Package: confluence-cli v2.6.3 (npm) Author: pchuri (single maintainer) License: MIT Repository: github.com/pchuri/confluence-cli Verdict: Safe to install No security vulnerabilities found.

item.title: nas-search-2026-05-11
item.description: 2026-05-11 NAS Product Search Report Date: 2026-05-11 Search Scope: ServeTheHome Storage category (pages 1-20+), ASUSTOR product list, Minisforum NAS collection Feeds Scanned: ServeTheHome Storage category (www.servethehome.com/category/storage/) - Pages 1-20+ (~100+ articles reviewed) ASUSTOR Produ...

item.title: SiliconMind-V1 — Chip Design Tasks & Reward System Analysis
item.description: SiliconMind-V1 — Chip Design Tasks & Reward System Analysis Overview Paper: SiliconMind-V1: Multi-Agent Distillation and Debug-Reasoning Workflows for Verilog Code Generation Authors: Mu-Chi Chen, Yu-Hung Kao, Po-Hsuan Huang, Shao-Chun Ho, Hsiang-Yu Tsou, I-Ting Wu, En-Ming Huang, Yu-Kai Hung, W...

item.title: Latest LLM Research - April 2026
item.description: Latest LLM Research Papers - April 2026 Source: arXiv cs.CL Date: April 9, 2026 Today’s Top Papers (April 9, 2026) 1.

item.title: OpenClaw plus OpenShell status report
item.description: OpenClaw plus OpenShell Status Report Official Status OpenClaw does have official documentation for OpenShell — there’s a page at docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/openshell describing it as a “managed sandbox backend for OpenClaw”, listed alongside Docker and SSH backends.

item.title: Trinity-RFT_Tinker_API_Analysis
item.description: Trinity-RFT Tinker API Integration Analysis Date: 2026-04-14 Status: Complete analysis Tinker SDK Version: 0.9.0 Executive Summary Trinity-RFT uses Tinker SDK’s SamplingClient for inference.

item.title: Trinity-RFT_vLLM_Installation
item.description: Trinity-RFT Installation Guide Date: 2026-04-14 Status: Complete Summary Trinity-RFT is a framework for reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) of LLMs.

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Welcome to Your Obsidian Vault! This is your new Obsidian vault created at ~/workspace/agent-obsidian-vault.
